lines.text: Is this all the manpower you can muster? It appears the Order truly is in decline. Or perhaps you think that little of me?
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II

lines.text: Hmph, Luther, you self-righteous bastard. Should I be referring to you as Priest Luther? Or is it Primus Luther now?
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II

lines.text: No, of course not. You'd never dare claim the Primus seat yourself. Let me guess, you're propping up that foolish Echo-headed girl from the Ministry of Holy Rituals as a puppet? I hear she's even made it to the Privy Council.
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II

lines.text: You're doing nothing, then? What of Barlin and Gnessa? They're allowing this nonsense to go unchecked?
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II

lines.text: Ah, there it is. You've lost your backbone and retreated back into your little shell again. Oh, Luther, are you planning to castrate the Order and hand it off to some noble family?
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II

lines.text: Who's backing you this time? The grinning tigress of the Montellis? Or is it the Bane of Fisalia?
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II

lines.text: Trial? Trial, you say?! Hahaha. No one holds the right to try me.
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II

lines.text: There's no Primus, no Priest, not even a representative from a family! Don't tell me you're planning to let the Ephor of Septimont decide the fate of a Ragunna Acolyte?
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II

lines.text: Luther... You can't be serious? Have you gone mad? You want us both to die? Together?!
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II

lines.text: Without us, what will become of Ragunna? Let those savage families tear it apart? Become an annex of Septimont? And don't forget the predators lurking on the other side of the mist!
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II

lines.text: Snap out of it, Luther. Ragunna won't survive without us! Centuries of work, the law and order we've built, our power and wealth. And you're ready to just hand it all away?!
lines.quest_name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II
